title: Prepare facilities for shearing and crutching
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare facilities for shearing and crutching demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Inspect facilities and equipment

pcs.text: Inspect facilities and assess for hygiene, safety and potential contamination hazards to prepare for efficient shearing and crutching requirements in line with workplace standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect facilities and assess for hygiene, safety and potential contamination hazards to prepare for efficient shearing and crutching requirements in line with workplace standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect facilities and assess for hygiene, safety and potential contamination hazards to prepare for efficient shearing and crutching requirements in line with workplace standards.

pcs.text: Identify equipment faults or malfunctions and report for repair or replacement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify equipment faults or malfunctions and report for repair or replacement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify equipment faults or malfunctions and report for repair or replacement.

pcs.text: Identify potential and existing WHS hazards, assess risks and implement control measures and report to relevant person
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential and existing WHS hazards, assess risks and implement control measures and report to relevant person?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential and existing WHS hazards, assess risks and implement control measures and report to relevant person.

pcs.text: Select, use and maintain suitable personal protective equipment (PPE)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, use and maintain suitable personal protective equipment (PPE)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, use and maintain suitable personal protective equipment (PPE).

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Inspect facilities and equipment

elements.title: Direct facilities preparation activity

pcs.text: Remove contaminating substances according to industry Quality Assurance (QA) and environmental requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove contaminating substances according to industry Quality Assurance (QA) and environmental requirements.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean facilities and equipment and eliminate hazards.

pcs.text: Engage wool harvesting staff in team activity to position tables and equipment

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Hold discussions with the presser in relation to property requirements.
